channel.title: IO on Anekoique's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in IO on Anekoique's Blog

item.title: Zero-copy
item.description: Zero-copy techniques in Linux — starting from the traditional read/write path (4 context switches, 2 DMA + 2 CPU copies) and walking through Direct I/O, mmap, sendfile, DMA gather, splice, and COW.
